title: 1 Hit
description: Allows creative players to kill mobs with one hit.
body:
## Description
Allows creative players to kill mobs with one hit.
This data pack is needed to avoid taking out weapons to kill mobs when you're in creative mode.

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6c65903519d1b5077b20cb1b74b70b5fe576384.png)

## Dependencies
- Fabric loader requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
